nodes.name: .stylelintrc.json
nodes.summary: Stylelint configuration extending the standard config and enabling the stylelint-order plugin to enforce alphabetical CSS property ordering in this exercise's stylesheets.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses the extends/plugins/rules pattern: a shared base config (stylelint-config-standard) is layered with a plugin rule (order/properties-alphabetical-order) for automatic property sorting.

nodes.name: index.html
nodes.summary: Minimal Korean-language demo page that links styles/main.css and renders a single .box element to visually verify the Stylelint property-ordering exercise.

nodes.name: package.json
nodes.summary: Package manifest declaring only devDependencies for the linting exercise: htmlhint, stylelint, stylelint-config-standard, and stylelint-order.
